patterns_recognized: Pick-column inversion risk: MIL@CHC CSV pick=CHC (home) was misread as MIL by prior run -- identical error to 05-16 CHC@CHW; all picks verified against raw CSV pick column this run.

D-grade SKIP picks where SP-edge AND PQI simultaneously oppose the model pick are directionally unreliable (validated 05-18: OAK@LAA 2-1 LAA win, LAD@SD 1-0 SD win); five SKIP/D games today carry this dual-headwind signature.

F3 values >5000 in PLATINUM context are calibration artifacts per 05-12 archive (SF@LAD F3=9589.3, LAD lost 9-3); TOR@NYY F3=7982.4 replicates the pattern consistent with grade D and model_prob/edge violations.
HARD CAP 1 fires on CLE@DET (-6.12pp) and LAD@SD (-7.15pp); same matchups as 05-18 -- cap correctly manages EV regardless of direction outcome.

ATL @ MIA.reasoning: Braxton Garrett has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date. PENDING_SP_DATA protocol correctly withholds -- validated 8+ times in the 2026 archive. ATL lineup (Acuna, Olson, Riley) is strong but SP quality is load-bearing for directional accuracy. No qualitative override possible.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA: 0-Statcast-pitch SP is a hard stop regardless of lineup signals

CLE @ DET.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly fired on -6.12pp negative edge, reducing pre-cap A- (score 4) to B- (score 1), stake=0. F1_xera_gap=1.64* (thin sample) and F3=1440.5 confirm CLE direction; Stage 1/2 agree (delta=0.05); pen_strain=0.1021 MODERATE. Market negative edge reflects superior SP-quality information. No qualitative reason to deviate from the cap.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1: negative-edge GOLD market pricing overrides F-signal conviction, 6+ validations
F1_xera_gap* thin-sample: direction readable but cap holds

BAL @ TB.reasoning: SP edge 1.38 xERA AGAINST TB (small-sample SP, min_pa=99) and PQI against (delta=-20.5) undercut TB 64% model confidence. bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked. fair_prob=0.5121 (market near coin flip vs model 64%) reflects market skepticism about TB bullpen-carry thesis. D-grade SKIP correctly applied; dual SP+PQI headwinds against pick reliably signal directional weakness.
lessons_applied: D-grade SKIP with SP-edge AND PQI both against pick is directionally unreliable (05-18 validation)
bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacking on D-grade

CIN @ PHI.reasoning: PHI B-grade (score=2) driven by PQI confirming PHI (+11.4) and Stage 1/2 agreement (delta=0.06). No F-signals fired, preventing GOLD -- without F1/F2/F3, GOLD cannot be justified regardless of edge or PQI. PHI lineup (Turner, Harper, Bohm) is directionally sound. No stress flags. SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: No F-signal fires -> SKIP tier regardless of PQI strength or B-grade
05-18 PHI won 5-4 in similar SKIP-B setup; direction sound but tier correct

NYM @ WSH.reasoning: Same matchup 05-18: WSH lost 16-7 with nearly identical signals (SP edge 1.82 xERA against WSH, PQI delta=-26.6). Today: SP edge 1.76 xERA AGAINST WSH, PQI delta=-27.1, bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade stacked. f5_full_delta=0.1958 and fair_prob=0.4228 both just miss formal thresholds (0.003 above 0.42 floor). Convergence of same-matchup structural failure plus near-miss on both conditions plus zero F-signals for WSH warrants OVERRIDE to NYM.
lessons_applied: 05-18: NYM@WSH same structural setup, WSH blown out 16-7 -- recurring model misread
No-F-signal + SP-against + large PQI-against is mandatory direction-caution trigger (05-18 postgame)
Near-miss on both thresholds on same-matchup repeat justifies OVERRIDE

PQI AGAINST NYY (delta=-13.1), Stage 1/2 disagree (f5_full_delta=0.25), confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue. Grade D (-1). DOWNGRADE PLATINUM->SKIP to correctly flag the label.

PLATINUM with grade D and model_prob+edge both outside valid ranges: explicit SKIP demotion warranted

PQI against CHC (-5.1). DOWNGRADE PLATINUM->SKIP.
